PREFACE 
wot 

This Register contains the names of all persons who have been enrolled for at 
least one term as students in any of the regular courses of instruction in the Massa- 
chusetts Institute of Technology, and whose connection with the Institute as under- 
graduates terminated before January 1, 1935. However, those who are affiliated 
with classes which will graduate in 1935 or later, and who are not in attendance 
now, are not included. 


’ 


The addresses and occupations have been corrected in accordance with in- 
formation furnished prior to March 15, 1935. The omission of an address indicates 
either that none has been supplied or that letters mailed to the last known address 
have been returned as unclaimed. Information regarding incorrect or missing ad- 
dresses and occupations is earnestly desired by the Alumni Association. 


The first classification is alphabetical. This section contains only the names 
of living former students. Only degrees awarded by the Institute are included. 
The class affiliation follows immediately after the name. The Course taken at the 
Institute is indicated by a Roman numeral and the SB or other degree received 
follows the Course. If the year in which the degree was awarded is different from 
the class affiliation, the year of the award is indicated in parentheses after the 
degree. 


In the Alphabetical section, the State is omitted for all who reside in Massa- 
chusetts. 


The Courses indicated by the Roman numerals are as follows: 


I Civil Engineering 

II Mechanical Engineering : 

III Mining Engineering or Metallurgy 

IV Architecture 

IV-A Architectural Engineering 

IV-B City Planning 

V Chemistry 

VI Electrical Engineering 

VI-A Electrical Engineering (Co-operative Course) 
VI-C Electrical Engineering (Communications) 
Vil Biology and Public Health 

VIII Physics 

IX-A General Science 

IX-B General Engineering 

IX-C Mathematics (Course XVIII after September 1, 1932) 
x Chemical Engineering

The following degrees and certificate are awarded by the Institute: 


SB

Doctor of Science 

Doctor of Public Health 

Doctor of Engineering (Discontinued after 1918) 


Following the Alphabetical section of living persons is an alphabetical list- 
ing of all deceased former students. Only the full name and class affiliation are 
given; for complete academic information about the deceased, communicate with 


the Alumni Association. 


The Class and Geographical sections include only the names of living former 
students; for more detailed information regarding any individual, reference should 
be made to the Alphabetical section. 


This Register includes lists of the Incorporators, the Presidents, and members 
of the Administrative Committee, of the Corporation, and of the Administrative and 


Instructing Staff. 


Ropert M. Kimpatt, Assistant Registrar
